title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE JOSE ABAD SANTOS HIGH SCHOOL TO PAMPANGA HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. NO. 33577 / 88 OG No. 21, 3043 (May 25, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7340, April 01, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE JOSE ABAD SANTOS HIGH SCHOOL TO PAMPANGA HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Jose Abad Santos High School in San Fernando, Pampanga, shall hereafter be known and referred to as the Pampanga High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 4, 1991 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: April 1, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
